blockingIssues.description: Remediation link construction is broken - always resolves to '#/course-map' regardless of ref type. The ternary condition is misplaced inside an if/else block.
handleSkip has fragile control flow when skipping the final question - finishDiagnostic() is called directly after setting skip state without proper sequencing.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document agent-browser commands for browser automation testing. Currently only the preview service (vite preview on port 4173) is documented, but phase3 features require browser automation via agent-browser.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: diagnostic-mode review used agent-browser commands (open, click) but services.yaml only documents preview server.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the db module location (src/lib/db.ts) and schema. Currently AGENTS.md only says 'IndexedDB via Dexie for local persistence' without specifying the path or database structure.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple workers discovered db.ts through imports rather than documentation. MasteryDashboard.tsx and DrillMode.tsx import from @/lib/db.
